description: Defines API contract rules for frontend/backend alignment, payload naming, and endpoint governance.

rules.name: API JSON uses camelCase
rules.description: External API request and response JSON fields must use camelCase.

rules.name: Frontend endpoints must match backend routes
rules.description: Frontend endpoint registry entries must match backend API path constants and registered routes.

rules.name: API paths are centralized
rules.description: Backend API path strings must be defined in centralized API path files.

rules.name: Response envelopes are consistent
rules.description: API responses should use consistent success/error/message/data envelope patterns.

rules.name: Backend and frontend endpoint contracts must be inspectable
rules.description: Frontend and backend endpoint definitions should be structured so they can be extracted, compared, and validated automatically by inspection scripts.
